creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
Alexander, 

I've seen you comment on https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=218165#c7 and #c8 on 2020-04-11
- so in case you would like to reclaim these two ports, that is of course possible anytime (just take them back with a commit), however that should
either only happen if you can act on the ports in a timely manner, 
and/or give blanket approval to danfe@, mandree@ and perhaps other people by adding a comment near the MAINTAINER= line if you cannot promise that in honesty so that we can fill in for you without delay and keep these two ports in synch with nvidia-driver in the future.

Thanks.
